steps.description: Type Maintain Customers menu option at the LEGADEMO main menu command prompt
Press Enter to navigate to Maintain Customers
Press F4 to open the Select Customer lookup list
Type the selection option next to the desired customer record in the lookup list
Press Enter to select the customer and open the customer detail screen
Type the new city value in the Customer City field
Press Enter to save the customer changes and return to the Maintain Customers screen
Press F3 to exit Maintain Customers and return to the LEGADEMO main menu
Type Customer Payments menu option at the LEGADEMO main menu command prompt
Press Enter to navigate to Customer Payments
Press F4 to open the Select Customer lookup list
Type the selection option next to the desired customer record in the lookup list
Press Enter to select the customer and open the customer payments detail screen
Press F3 to exit Customer Payments and return to the LEGADEMO main menu
Type Maintain Items menu option at the LEGADEMO main menu command prompt
Press Enter to navigate to Maintain Items
Press F4 to open the Select Item lookup list
Type the selection option next to the desired item record in the lookup list
Press Enter to select the item and open the item detail screen
Press Enter to confirm and return to the Maintain Items screen
Press F3 to exit Maintain Items and return to the LEGADEMO main menu
Type Incoming Stock menu option at the LEGADEMO main menu command prompt
Press Enter to navigate to Incoming Stock
Press F3 to exit Incoming Stock and return to the LEGADEMO main menu
Type Incoming Stock menu option again at the LEGADEMO main menu command prompt
Press Enter to navigate to Incoming Stock
Press F4 to open the Select Item lookup list
Type the selection option next to the desired item record in the lookup list
Press Enter to select the item and view its incoming stock detail screen
Press F3 to exit Incoming Stock and return to the LEGADEMO main menu
Type Order Entry menu option at the LEGADEMO main menu command prompt
Press Enter to navigate to Order Entry
Press F4 to open the Select Order lookup list
Type the selection option next to the desired order record in the lookup list
Press Enter to select the order and open the order detail screen
Press F3 to exit Order Entry and return to the LEGADEMO main menu
Type Delivered Orders menu option at the LEGADEMO main menu command prompt
Press Enter to navigate to Delivered Orders
Press F4 to open the Select Order lookup list
Type the selection option next to the desired order record in the lookup list
Press Enter to select the order and view the order delivery detail screen
Press F3 to exit Delivered Orders and return to the LEGADEMO main menu
Type View Customer Turn over menu option at the LEGADEMO main menu command prompt
Press Enter to navigate to View Customer Turn over
Press F4 on the From Customer number field to open the Select Customer lookup list
Type the selection option next to the desired starting customer record in the lookup list
Press Enter to set the From Customer number
Press F4 on the To Customer number field to open the Select Customer lookup list
Type the selection option next to the desired ending customer record in the lookup list
Press Enter to set the To Customer number
Press Enter to submit the criteria and display the Customer Turn over overview report
Press F3 to exit View Customer Turn over and return to the LEGADEMO main menu
Type View Item Turn over menu option at the LEGADEMO main menu command prompt
Press Enter to navigate to View Item Turn over
Press F4 on the From Item number field to open the Select Item lookup list
Type the selection option next to the desired starting item record in the lookup list
Press Enter to set the From Item number
Press F4 on the To Item number field to open the Select Item lookup list
Type the selection option next to the desired ending item record in the lookup list
Press Enter to set the To Item number
Press Enter to submit the criteria and display the Item Turn over overview report
Press F3 to exit View Item Turn over and return to the LEGADEMO main menu
Type End of Year Procedure menu option at the LEGADEMO main menu command prompt
Press Enter to navigate to the End of Year Procedure confirmation screen
Press Enter to confirm and execute the End of Year Procedure
Type Sign off menu option at the LEGADEMO main menu command prompt
Press Enter to sign off and exit the LEGADEMO application
